text:
13. (1) Category I Alternative Investment Fund and Category II Alternative Investment Fund shall
be close ended and the tenure of fund or scheme shall be determined at the time of
application subject to sub-regulation (2) of this regulation.
(2) Category I and II Alternative Investment Fund or schemes launched by such funds shall
have a minimum tenure of three years.
(3) 50[Schemes of] Category III Alternative Investment Fund may be open ended or close
ended.
(4) 51[The manner of calculating the tenure of a close ended scheme of an Alternative
Investment Fund, including the manner of modification of the tenure, may be specified by
the Board from time to time.]
(5) Extension of the tenure of the close ended Alternative Investment Fund may be permitted
up to two years subject to approval of two-thirds of the unit holders by value of their
investment in the Alternative Investment Fund 52[:]
48 Inserted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Amendment) Regulations,
2022 w.e.f 24.01.2022
49 Inserted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Fourth Amendment)
Regulations, 2022, w.e.f. 15-11-2022.
50 Inserted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Fourth Amendment)
Regulations, 2018, w.e.f. 13-08-2021.
51 Inserted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Fourth Amendment)
Regulations, 2022, w.e.f. 15-11-2022.
52 Substituted for “.” by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) (Third
Amendment) Regulations, 2021, w.e.f. 03-08-2021.

--- PAGE 22 ---
53[Provided that large value funds for accredited investors may be permitted to extend its
tenure beyond two years, subject to terms of the contribution agreement, other fund
documents and such conditions as may be specified by the Board from time to time.]
(6) In the absence of consent of unit holders, the Alternative Investment Fund shall fully
liquidate within one year following expiration of the fund tenure or extended tenure.
Listing.
